title: Jaam's Shinerite
description: Introduces a new glowing and dyeable ore used to craft tools, weapons, armor, and blocks.
body:
## 📖 Overview: **Jaam’s Shinerite** is a vanilla+ content expansion focused on visual identity and interaction. Centered around a new glowing and dyeable mineral, the mod introduces a unique material that visually stands out while seamlessly blending into Minecraft’s world and gameplay. Shinerite reacts to its environment, glowing dynamically and interacting with different mechanics that affect its appearance and behavior. Players can dye and remove color, imbue items with potion effects, and apply wax to protect colors and enhancements from being altered. The goal is to make Shinerite feel alive and responsive, fostering creativity through light, color, and experimentation. Every mechanic is designed to be intuitive and immersive, providing players with new expressive tools while staying true to the vanilla experience.


## 🎯 Features: - **New ore with a full set of content, including tools, weapons, armor, and decorative blocks.** - **New enchantments and advancements.** - **Potion imbuement, waxing, washing, glowing, and dyeing mechanics.** - **Datapack-friendly for easy customization and expansion.** - **Dedicated mod compatibility.** - **Advanced tooltips system.** - **Extensive configuration options.** - **And more!**
Spoiler


## 🤝 Compability: - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) - [Jaam's Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jaams-weaponry)


## ⚙️ Recommended Mods: - [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) - [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) - [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)


## 🚧 Future Plans: - **Themed updates and Integration of community feedback.** - **Additional configuration options and new quality-of-life improvements.** - **Expanded compatibility with other major mods.** - **Mod wiki with extensive documentation.**
